name: Ume
description_short: UMe Federal Credit Union is a Burbank-based credit union offering checking, savings, vehicle loans, mortgages, and credit cards with a community-focused approach.
description_long:
UMe Federal Credit Union operates as a community-focused financial institution based in Burbank, California. The institution positions itself around the philosophy of 'U + Me,' emphasizing personal relationships and local community involvement rather than treating members as account numbers. Founded with deep roots in the Burbank area, UMe has built its reputation on member satisfaction and visible community engagement.

UMe offers a comprehensive suite of banking products including free checking accounts, savings accounts, Visa credit cards, auto loans (starting at 4.50% APR), home equity loans (starting at 5.99% APR), and mortgage services. They provide a mobile app for digital banking and have introduced CardNav, a card management tool. The institution also offers scholarship programs for local high school seniors and provides new baby savers accounts with $50 opening bonuses.

What distinguishes UMe is their demonstrated commitment to the Burbank community. In 2025 alone, they donated $32,556 to the Burbank Unified School District, $11,264 to local organizations, awarded $5,500 in scholarships, helped raise $23,180 for the Burbank Arts & Education Foundation, and volunteered 388 hours with local groups. Member testimonials emphasize personalized service, friendly staff who remember customers by name, and genuine concern for community wellbeing. Their brand positioning strongly emphasizes local pride and the 'nosy neighbor' metaphor for financial advice.

As a credit union, UMe is member-owned and operates on a not-for-profit basis. However, specific information about membership requirements, branch locations beyond Burbank, geographic service areas, and full product details are limited on the website. The institution appears primarily geared toward Burbank residents or those with local connections, and there is no clear indication of whether they serve broader regions or membership is restricted.
services: Savings accounts with $50 new baby bonus
Member-owned credit union structure with profit-sharing
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.50% APR with positive member experiences
Home equity loans starting at 5.99% APR for existing members
Strong community involvement with documented donations of $32,556+ to local schools and organizations in 2025
Personalized service model where staff reportedly remember members by name and prioritize relationship-building
Free checking accounts available with no mention of monthly fees
UMe CardNav tool offering enhanced card management and control features
Mobile app available for digital banking convenience
$50 bonus for new baby savings accounts demonstrating commitment to family financial planning
cons: Limited geographic information—appears to primarily serve Burbank residents only with unclear membership eligibility for non-local customers
Credit card APR of 12.90% is higher than many competing credit union and bank cards
Website lacks detailed information about membership requirements, fees, account minimums, and full product specifications
Single location reference (Burbank) suggests limited branch accessibility compared to national banks or larger credit unions
No information about online account opening or remote membership options
best_for: Burbank residents and employees seeking a community-oriented credit union with personalized service
Local homebuyers and refinancers wanting competitive mortgage and home equity loan rates
Vehicle buyers looking for competitive auto loan rates from a credit union with strong member reviews
Community-minded individuals who want their banking relationship to support local schools and nonprofits
diagnosis: UMe is best for Burbank-area residents prioritizing personalized, community-focused banking with competitive rates on loans and mortgages from a credit union. The main caveat is that service appears limited to Burbank or nearby areas with unclear membership eligibility for those outside the community, and detailed fee and rate information is not readily available on their website.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
